Partners

Help this project reach someone who needs it.

Don't Lose Your Way welcomes partnerships, grants, sponsorships, and creative contributions from organizations and individuals who share our mission: ensuring no one faces their quiet moments alone.

Mental Health Organizations

Partner with us to extend crisis support and emotional resources to underserved communities.

Grants & Funding

Help us sustain and scale this free platform so it remains accessible to everyone who needs it.

Sponsorships

Aligned organizations can sponsor specific features, content, or community outreach programs.

Creative Contributions

Musicians, writers, and artists can contribute to the Chapel, Journal, and Podcast.

Get In Touch

Interested in partnering? We'd love to hear from you.

Thank you.

We'll be in touch soon.

Stay.

About Disclaimer Terms Privacy Policy AI Disclosure Crisis Protocol Crisis: 988

This site is intended for individuals 13 and older.

This space exists for people who almost gave up — and stayed.

LinkedIn X Instagram Facebook TikTok YouTube

Built with ♥ by CC3PO — AI-powered tools for real people

If you're in immediate distress or thinking about harming yourself, please reach out now.

Call or text 988 — 24/7 • Free • Confidential
